children.text: #elanmvc-subs-strip3-1, #elanmvc-subs-strip4-1, .k-tabstrip-wrapper, #payments{ overflow: visible; } .contentBox{ overflow: visible; } #elanmvc-subs-title { margin-bottom: 0.25em; margin-top: 0; } #elanmvc-subs-nav { float: right; } #elanmvc-subs-nav .k-dropdown { min-width: 270px; } .titleInput { font-weight: bold; } table.defaultSummary { border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: .5em; } table.defaultSummary td { vertical-align: top; } .tbd { color: #777777; }

children.text: .Active, .NotStarted, .Unposted { background-color: green; color: white; } .Suspended, .Expired, .Grace, .Held { background-color: yellow; color: #000; } .Cancelled { background-color: red; color: #fff; }

function breakAnswer(data, field) { return data[field].join('
'); } function onExcelExportDemographics(e) { var sheet = e.workbook.sheets[0]; for (var i = 1; i < sheet.rows.length; i++) { var row = sheet.rows[i]; var codeList = row.cells[1].value; if (codeList) { row.cells[1].value = codeList.join(', '); } var descriptionList = row.cells[2].value; if (descriptionList) { row.cells[2].value = descriptionList.join(', '); } } }

function onGridChange(e) { var menus = $("ul[id*='menu']"); for (var i = 0; i < menus.length; i++) { $(menus[i]).kendoMenu({ }); } } function openInvoices(el) { var row = $(el).closest("tr"); var invoiceDataItem = $("#elanmvc-circ-invoicesgrid").data("kendoGrid").dataItem(row); var grid = $('#invoice-notices-grid').data("kendoGrid"); var dataSource = new kendo.data.DataSource({ data: invoiceDataItem.InvoiceNotices }); grid.setDataSource(dataSource); $('#elanmvc-circ-invoice-notices').data().kendoWindow.center().open(); } function getReminderTemplate(data) { var html = ''; if (data.Reminders > 0) { html += data.Reminders + ''; } else { html += data.Reminders; } return html; }

var subID = "541000"; var nameId = "502157"; var pubId = "BHI"; var status = "Expired"; var mediaType = "Print"; var subType = "Paid"; var copies = "1"; var renewalID = ""; var issuesReceived = "12"; var batchId = "101949"; var hasDemographics = true; var errorCode = ""; var errorDescription = ""; var onlyEditChangePriceTerm = false; var isIssueRunActive = false; var isGroupOrder = false; var useEntitlements = false; if (errorCode.length > 0 && errorCode == "1832") { //Only Allow editing of change price/term onlyEditChangePriceTerm = true; } $(document).ready(function(){ if (errorDescription.length > 0) { ElanMvc.showErrors('(' + errorCode + ') - ' + errorDescription); } }); var editable = true; if (status == "Unposted") { editable = false; $('#ActionList').prop('title', 'Cannot edit an Unposted subscription'); } if (isIssueRunActive) { editable = false; $('#ActionList').prop('title', 'Issue run is active no updates permitted'); } var timeBased = false; if (mediaType == "Web" || mediaType == "Misc") { timeBased = true; } var priceTermText = "Change Price/Term/Copies"; var priceTermTitle = ""; var priceTermDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled" && timeBased) { priceTermDisable = true; priceTermTitle = "Cannot Change Price/Term on a Cancelled Subscription."; } if (subType != "Paid") { if (subType == "Free") { priceTermText = "Change Start/Term/Copies"; }else{ priceTermText = "Change Term/Copies"; } } var replacementIssuesText = "Replacement Issue(s)"; var replacementIssuesTitle = ""; var replacementIssuesDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled") { replacementIssuesDisable = true; replacementIssuesTitle += "Cannot Select Replacement Issue(s) on a Cancelled Subscription."; } else if (timeBased) { replacementIssuesDisable = true; replacementIssuesTitle += "Cannot Select Replacement Issue(s) for a Time Based Subscription. "; }else if (issuesReceived == "0") { replacementIssuesDisable = true; replacementIssuesTitle += "Replacement Issues cannot be sent because no issues have been served. "; } //Premium Products var premiumText = "Premium Product(s)"; var premiumTitle = ""; var premiumDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled") { premiumDisable = true; premiumTitle = "Cannot Select Premium Products for a Cancelled Subscription."; } var renewText = "Renew Sub"; var renewTitle = ""; var renewDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled") { renewDisable = true; renewTitle += "Cannot Renew a Cancelled Subscription. "; } if (renewalID != "") { renewDisable = true; renewTitle += "This subscription has already been renewed. "; } var alternateDeliveryText = "Update Alternate Delivery"; var alternateDeliveryTitle = ""; var alternateDeliveryDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled") { alternateDeliveryDisable = true; alternateDeliveryTitle += "Cannot Change Alternate Delivery for a Cancelled Subscription. "; } if (timeBased) { alternateDeliveryDisable = true; alternateDeliveryTitle += "Cannot Change Alternate Delivery for a Time Based Subscription. "; } var suspendReactivateText = "Suspend Subscription"; var suspendReactivateTitle = ""; var suspendReactivateDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled" || status == "Held") { suspendReactivateDisable = true; suspendReactivateTitle = "Cannot Suspend/Reactivate a " + status + " Subscription."; } if (status == "Suspended"){ suspendReactivateText = "Reactivate Subscription" } var cancelText = "Cancel Subscription"; var cancelTitle = ""; var cancelDisable = false; if (status == "Cancelled") { cancelText = "View Cancellation Details"; } else if (status == "Proforma") { cancelDisable = true; cancelTitle = "You must cancel a Proforma sub from the Group Cancel Screen."; } var demographicsText = "Update Demographics"; var demographicsTitle = ""; var demographicsDisable = false; if (hasDemographics != true) { demographicsDisable = true; demographicsTitle = "No Demographics setup for this subscription product" } var renewalDetailsText = "Update Renewal Details"; var renewalDetailsTitle = ""; var renewalDetailsDisable = false; var agentDonorDetailsText = "Update Agent/Gift Details"; var agentDonorDetailsTitle = ""; var agentDonorDetailsDisable = false; if (isGroupOrder) { var agentDonorDetailsText = "Update Agent/Donor Details"; } var billingDetailsText = "Update Billing Details"; var billingDetailsTitle = ""; var billingDetailsDisable = false; var nameTransferText = "Name Transfer"; var nameTransferTitle = ""; var nameTransferDisable = false; var pubTransferText = "Subscription Product Transfer"; var pubTransferTitle = ""; var pubTransferDisable = false; var subscriptionNotesText = "Subscription Notes"; var subscriptionNotesTitle = ""; var subscriptionNotesDisable = false; var salesRepsText = "Sales Reps"; var salesRepsTitle = ""; var salesRepsDisable = false; var entitlementsText = "Entitlements"; var entitlementsTitle = ""; var entitlementsDisable = false; if (!useEntitlements) { entitlementsDisable = true; entitlementsTitle = "This account is not configured to use entitlements."; } var editEmailsText = "Update Email Addresses"; var editEmailsTitle = ""; var editEmailsDisable = false; if (mediaType != "Email") { var editEmailsTitle = "Only applies to Email Type Subscriptions."; var editEmailsDisable = true; } var editMiscText = "Update Misc Info"; var editMiscTitle = ""; var editMiscDisable = false; var editOptions = [{ text: cancelText, value: "Cancel", disabled: cancelDisable, title: cancelTitle }, { text: priceTermText, value: "ChangePriceTerm", disabled: priceTermDisable, title: priceTermTitle }, { text: entitlementsText, value: "GetEntitlementDetails", disabled: entitlementsDisable, title: entitlementsTitle }, { text: nameTransferText, value: "UpdateNameTransferDetails", disabled: nameTransferDisable, title: nameTransferTitle }, { text: pubTransferText, value: "UpdatePubTransferDetails", disabled: pubTransferDisable, title: pubTransferTitle }, { text: premiumText, value: "Premiums", disabled: premiumDisable, title: premiumTitle }, { text: renewText, value: "RenewSub", disabled: renewDisable, title: renewTitle }, { text: replacementIssuesText, value: "ReplacementIssues", disabled: replacementIssuesDisable, title: replacementIssuesTitle }, { text: salesRepsText, value: "GetSalesRepDetails", disabled: salesRepsDisable, title: salesRepsTitle }, { text: subscriptionNotesText, value: "GetSubscriptionNotesDetails", disabled: subscriptionNotesDisable, title: subscriptionNotesTitle }, { text: suspendReactivateText, value: "SuspendReactivate", disabled: suspendReactivateDisable, title: suspendReactivateTitle }, { text: agentDonorDetailsText, value: "GetAgentDonorDetails", disabled: agentDonorDetailsDisable, title: agentDonorDetailsTitle }, { text: alternateDeliveryText, value: "UpdateAlternateDelivery", disabled: alternateDeliveryDisable, title: alternateDeliveryTitle }, { text: billingDetailsText, value: "GetBillingDetails", disabled: billingDetailsDisable, title: billingDetailsTitle }, { text: demographicsText, value: "GetDemographicDetails", disabled: demographicsDisable, title: demographicsTitle }, { text: editEmailsText, value: "GetSubscriptionEmailDetails", disabled: editEmailsDisable, title: editEmailsTitle }, { text: editMiscText, value: "GetSubscriptionMiscDetails", disabled: editMiscDisable, title: editMiscTitle }, { text: renewalDetailsText, value: "GetRenewalDetails", disabled: renewalDetailsDisable, title: renewalDetailsTitle }]; if (onlyEditChangePriceTerm) { editOptions = [{ text: priceTermText, value: "ChangePriceTerm", disabled: false, title: priceTermTitle }]; } if (status == "Proforma") { editOptions = [{ text: cancelText, value: "CancelProforma", disabled: false, title: cancelTitle }]; } function reloadPage() { location.reload(); } function onCircEditSelect(e) { var dataItem = this.dataItem(e.item); var action = dataItem.value; if (action == "") { return false; }else if (action == "RenewSub"){ var url = ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + "/circ/entry_orders_circ.aspx?subID=" + subID; url += '&renew=1'; kendo.ui.progress($('#elanmvc-page'), true); location.href = url; return false; }else if (action == "CancelProforma"){ ElanMvc.confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel this order? The record will be permanently deleted.', confirmCancelProforma, cancelCancelProforma, { title: 'Cancel Proforma Order', okText: 'Yes', cancelText: 'No' }); return false; } var title = dataItem.text; var href = ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + "/Circ/Subscription/" + action + "/" + subID; if (action == "GetDemographicDetails") { href = ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + "/Circ/Subscription/" + action + "/" + pubId + "?NameId=" + nameId + "&subscriptionId=" + subID; } if (action == 'GetSubscriptionEmailDetails') { href = ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + "/Circ/Subscription/" + action + "/" + subID + "?copies=" + copies; } if (action == 'Entitlements') { title = 'Subscription ' + subID + title; } var circWin = $('#elanmvc-circ-actions'); if (!circWin.data("kendoWindow")) { // window not yet initialized circWin.kendoWindow({ width: "auto", height: "auto", modal: true, resizable: true, title: title, content: href, error: function(e){ ElanMvc.notify(e.xhr.message); this.close(); } }); } else { // reopening window circWin.data("kendoWindow") .content("
Loading...
") // add loading message .refresh(href) // request the URL via AJAX .title(title).open().center(); // open the window } return false; } function centerKendoWindow(e) { this.center(); } function confirmCancelProforma() { kendo.ui.progress($('#page-wrapper'), true); //Ajax Call to cancel and return to the group order $.ajax({ type: "POST", url: ElanMvc.settings.baseUrl + '/Circ/Subscription/CancelProforma?id=' + subID, success: function (result) { window.location = document.getElementById('return-to-group-order').href; }, error: function (xhr, status, error) { kendo.ui.progress($('#page-wrapper'), false); } }) } function cancelCancelProforma() { } $("#ActionList").kendoDropDownList({ dataTextField: "text", dataValueField: "value", dataSource: editOptions, index: 0, optionLabel: "Select an Edit Option", template: kendo.template($("#edit-options-template").html()), dataBound: function (e) { $(".tbd").parent().click(false); }, select: onCircEditSelect, enabled: editable, height: 500 });
